_meta.author: dhileepkumargm
_meta.title: Aether Flow
_meta.description: fragment shader is designed to be more visually creative, generating a flowing, multi-layered "river" of cosmic energy. It combines several layers of procedural noise that move at different speeds to create a sense of depth. The effect is fully interactive, reacting to your mouse movements by creating beautiful warps and ripples in the flow.
